daily_fact: Stay engaged with your community through local news and civic participation.
topline_md: In recent news, seven individuals were injured by carbon monoxide in a Bronx apartment, a day care was destroyed by fire, and severe storms caused power outages across New York and New Jersey, highlighting ongoing safety and infrastructure challenges in the region.

risks_alerts.title: Risks & Alerts
risks_alerts.summary_md:
### Risks & Alerts

- 7 people injured, 2 seriously, by carbon monoxide in Concourse, Bronx apartment building. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Bronx day care destroyed in fire, leaving families scrambling for care. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Severe storms down trees and cause power outages across New York and New Jersey. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
